prestazioni: Engine: M275 E60 AL (6.0L V12 Bi-Turbo) – Full internal build with forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Twin Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA turbochargers with custom 4.0-inch titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, paired with a custom 4.5-inch stainless steel downpipe system by Armytrix for unobstructed exhaust flow.

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2,000cc), and a custom fuel rail system by Radium Engineering. Methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual 10-gallon tanks and AEM methanol flow sensors for precise delivery.

Drivetrain: Reinforced 7G-Tronic transmission with a Level 10 torque converter, upgraded valve body, and a custom transmission cooler by Setrab. Limited-slip differential from OS Giken with 4.11:1 gearing and a Quaife ATB differential for improved torque distribution. Custom driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop with 3.5-inch chromoly steel tubing and CV joints rated for 1,200 lb-ft of torque.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Custom hand-fabricated widebody kit by Wald International (Japan), extending the fenders by 3.5 inches per side with carbon fiber overfenders and custom aluminum inner fender liners. Aggressive front splitter and rear diffuser by Prior Design, with integrated air curtains for aerodynamic efficiency.

Wheels & Suspension: Forged 22x12.5-inch front and 22x13.5-inch rear wheels by HRE Performance (FF16 model) with custom offsets for Pullman-specific fitment. Air suspension by Air Lift Performance with 3P management, custom valving, and reinforced air struts to handle the extended wheelbase. Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with external reservoirs for track use.

Exterior & Aero: Full custom matte Selenite Grey wrap with PPF on high-impact areas. Rear wing by Vorsteiner (V-FF103 model) with adjustable carbon fiber flaps for downforce tuning. Custom LED headlight conversion by Diode Dynamics with adaptive laser high beams, and a full carbon fiber engine cover by Seibon with integrated heat extraction vents.
